subject: presentation in nm on california experience

emails.subject: Presentation in NM on California experience
emails.subject_base: Presentation in NM on California experience
emails.body: Presentation in NM on California experience I have plagarized Steve Kean's presentation on California and liberally sprinkled in some of the EPSA report to make a presentation tomorrow before the NMPRC and probably some legislators as well. If you have a chance to review it for substance (or anything else) and can get back to me today, I would appreciate it. If you don't have time, don't sweat it. They never listen to me anyway! Thanks

emails.subject: Re: Presentation in NM on California experience
emails.subject_base: Presentation in NM on California experience
emails.body: Re: Presentation in NM on California experience Leslie I think we are soft pedalling our opposition to price caps for residential customers. If that's what it takes to rescue dereg, seems like it's a small price to pay in the overall scheme of things. Looks good. Leslie Lawner@EES 09/25/2000 11:47 AM
